name: http-retry
description: Make outbound HTTP requests with configurable retry and exponential backoff. Retries on transient errors (429, 5xx) up to MAX_RETRIES times.

MAX_RETRIES.description: Maximum retry attempts after initial failure

BACKOFF_MS.description: Initial backoff delay in milliseconds (doubles each retry)

RETRY_ON_STATUS.description: Comma-separated HTTP status codes that trigger a retry
